notes_for_human_reviewer: MORE-ARTIFACTS FAILURE MODE — exactly the misdiagnosis the chapter warns against. Submission identifies the current phase but never traces backward (caps phase_diagnosis_accuracy at 3 per prompt rule, but execution is generic so probably 2). The whole recommendation is 'produce v2 of every artifact' — the exact wrong move. The artifact_vs_understanding_distinction prompt cap (2) explicitly fires here. No transition awareness. Methodology mention is empty ('provides flexibility'). CALIBRATION NOTE (2026-05-05): first run scored concrete_intervention at 1 — Claude reads 'produce v2 of every artifact' as concretely-wrong rather than concretely-actionable, since wrong actions with named owners are not interventions, they are activity. Defensible reading. Adjusted to score=2 with tolerance=2 (allows 0-4) so reasonable graders can score 1-3. Tests whether the grader catches the inversion: structure looks great, content is exactly the misdiagnosis. Most important fixture in the corpus for this competency.
